scripts.dev: bun run generate:api && bun --hot main.ts | pino-pretty
scripts.typecheck: bun run generate:api && bun run typecheck:app
scripts.check: bun run lint && bun run generate:api && bun run typecheck:app
scripts.lint: bun run lint:code && bun run lint:openapi
scripts.generate:api: rm -rf generated && bun run docs:bundle && openapi-code-generator --input ./docs/generated/openapi.yaml --input-type openapi3 --output ./generated --template typescript-express --schema-builder zod-v4 --grouping-strategy first-tag && bun run bin/generateOutputTypes.ts && bun run bin/generateRouteAuth.ts && bun run bin/generateErrorProfiles.ts
scripts.generate:bruno: bun run docs:bundle && bun run bin/generateBrunoCollection.ts
scripts.generate:all: bun run generate:api && bun run bin/generateBrunoCollection.ts && bun run docs:build
scripts.docs:build: mkdir -p ../frontend/public/docs/api && redocly bundle public -o ../frontend/public/docs/api/openapi.yaml --remove-unused-components && redocly build-docs ../frontend/public/docs/api/openapi.yaml -o ../frontend/public/docs/api/index.html --title "Nadeshiko API Docs" --disableGoogleFont
scripts.docs:build:internal: mkdir -p ../frontend/public/docs/api-internal && redocly bundle main -o ../frontend/public/docs/api-internal/openapi.yaml --remove-unused-components && redocly build-docs ../frontend/public/docs/api-internal/openapi.yaml -o ../frontend/public/docs/api-internal/index.html --title "Nadeshiko API Docs" --disableGoogleFont
scripts.cloc: echo '=== Application Code ===' && cloc --exclude-dir=node_modules,dist,generated,.nuxt,.output,prod,docs,tests . && echo '=== Test Code ===' && cloc --exclude-dir=node_modules,dist,generated,.nuxt,.output,prod,docs ./tests
